parameters.name: get_connected_clients
parameters.description: Get all devices and clients currently connected to the UniFi network
Get error logs, alarms and alerts from the UniFi network. Use this when asked about network errors, warnings, issues, problems, alarms or anything that went wrong on the network
Get access points with high TX retry rates on the UniFi network. Use this when asked about TX retries, wireless performance issues, access point problems, or poor WiFi quality

Get a list of UniFi access points that are on the same channel and can hear each other, causing co-channel interference and poor WiFi performance. Use this when asked about channel conflicts, interference, or RF issues.
